summary: Iteration 63 - RSE Formula Implementation Testing. All 13 backend tests passed. Frontend verified: Admin sees full RSE breakdown (FORMULE RSE CONFIDENTIELLE banner, 30% Frais, 70% Distribue: 25% GreenLink, 5% Coop, 70% Paysan), Config dialog allows rate change. Cooperative page correctly shows 5% commission (not 10%) and hides RSE formula. Farmer page hides RSE details, shows only their amount. Orange Money payments are MOCKED.
critical_code_review_comments: GET /api/admin/carbon-premiums/config returns repartition with frais_pct=30, greenlink_pct=25, cooperative_pct=5, paysan_pct=70 and taux_par_hectare
PUT /api/admin/carbon-premiums/config/rate allows Super Admin to change taux_par_hectare
GET /api/admin/carbon-premiums/stats returns full RSE breakdown: total_rse, total_frais, total_greenlink, total_paye_planteurs, total_paye_cooperatives, taux_actuel
GET /api/admin/carbon-premiums/requests returns requests with rse_total, frais, greenlink_share, taux_par_hectare visible to Admin
GET /api/farmer/carbon-premiums/my-requests does NOT expose rse_total, frais, greenlink_share, taux_par_hectare (only farmer_amount)
GET /api/cooperative/carbon-premiums/admin-requests does NOT expose rse_total, frais, greenlink_share, taux_par_hectare (only farmer_amount and coop_commission)
GET /api/cooperative/carbon-premiums/members does NOT expose rate_per_hectare in summary
POST /api/ussd/callback (menu 2*1) creates request with RSE formula stored in DB but USSD response shows only farmer amount (no percentage breakdown)
Frontend Admin CarbonPremiumsManagement.jsx shows 'FORMULE RSE (CONFIDENTIELLE)' banner with full breakdown
Frontend Admin Config dialog allows changing taux_par_hectare with formula preview
Frontend Admin Financial breakdown shows RSE Total, Frais 30%, GreenLink 25%, Cooperatives 5%, Paysans 70%
Frontend Coop CarbonPremiumsPage.jsx shows only 2 columns (Part planteur + Commission coop), no RSE total
Frontend Coop banner says 'Votre cooperative recoit automatiquement 5% de commission' (not 10%)
Frontend Farmer CarbonScorePage.jsx shows only farmer_amount, no RSE formula details
seed_data_creation: No new seed data created. Tested with existing payment requests.
context_for_next_testing_agent: RSE Formula implementation complete. Formula: RSE = score x taux_XOF x hectares. Repartition: 30% frais, 70% distribue (25% GreenLink, 5% Coop, 70% Paysan). Rate is stored in carbon_config collection (key='premium_rate'). Admin sees full breakdown, Coop/Farmer see only their amounts. Math verified: For score=7.5, area=3ha, taux=5000: RSE=112,500, frais=33,750, distributable=78,750, greenlink=19,688, coop=3,938, farmer=55,124. Orange Money payments are MOCKED.

mocked_api_note.Orange Money API: MOCKED - payments logged but not actually processed
